title: Yield Overview
description: First-pass yield, pass/fail volume, and overall yield metrics

list.name: phase
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT phase FROM runs WHERE phase IS NOT NULL ORDER BY phase

list.name: product
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT product_id FROM runs WHERE product_id IS NOT NULL ORDER BY product_id

list.name: station
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT station_id FROM runs WHERE station_id IS NOT NULL ORDER BY station_id

targets.rawSql: SELECT round(100.0 * count(*) FILTER (WHERE outcome = 'passed') / count(*), 1) AS yield_pct FROM runs WHERE started_at BETWEEN '${__from:date}' AND '${__to:date}' AND (phase LIKE '${phase}' OR '${phase}' = '%') AND (product_id LIKE '${product}' OR '${product}' = '%') AND (station_id LIKE '${station}' OR '${station}' = '%')

SELECT count(*) AS total FROM runs WHERE started_at BETWEEN '${__from:date}' AND '${__to:date}' AND (phase LIKE '${phase}' OR '${phase}' = '%') AND (product_id LIKE '${product}' OR '${product}' = '%') AND (station_id LIKE '${station}' OR '${station}' = '%')

SELECT count(*) AS passed FROM runs WHERE outcome = 'passed' AND started_at BETWEEN '${__from:date}' AND '${__to:date}' AND (phase LIKE '${phase}' OR '${phase}' = '%') AND (product_id LIKE '${product}' OR '${product}' = '%') AND (station_id LIKE '${station}' OR '${station}' = '%')

SELECT count(*) AS failed FROM runs WHERE outcome = 'failed' AND started_at BETWEEN '${__from:date}' AND '${__to:date}' AND (phase LIKE '${phase}' OR '${phase}' = '%') AND (product_id LIKE '${product}' OR '${product}' = '%') AND (station_id LIKE '${station}' OR '${station}' = '%')

SELECT count(*) AS errors FROM runs WHERE outcome = 'errored' AND started_at BETWEEN '${__from:date}' AND '${__to:date}' AND (phase LIKE '${phase}' OR '${phase}' = '%') AND (product_id LIKE '${product}' OR '${product}' = '%') AND (station_id LIKE '${station}' OR '${station}' = '%')

SELECT outcome, count(*) AS cnt FROM runs WHERE started_at BETWEEN '${__from:date}' AND '${__to:date}' AND (phase LIKE '${phase}' OR '${phase}' = '%') AND (product_id LIKE '${product}' OR '${product}' = '%') AND (station_id LIKE '${station}' OR '${station}' = '%') GROUP BY outcome

SELECT date_trunc('hour', started_at) AS time, round(100.0 * count(*) FILTER (WHERE outcome = 'passed') / count(*), 1) AS fpy FROM runs WHERE started_at BETWEEN '${__from:date}' AND '${__to:date}' AND (phase LIKE '${phase}' OR '${phase}' = '%') AND (product_id LIKE '${product}' OR '${product}' = '%') AND (station_id LIKE '${station}' OR '${station}' = '%') GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

SELECT date_trunc('hour', started_at) AS time, count(*) FILTER (WHERE outcome = 'passed') AS pass, count(*) FILTER (WHERE outcome = 'failed') AS fail, count(*) FILTER (WHERE outcome = 'errored') AS error FROM runs WHERE started_at BETWEEN '${__from:date}' AND '${__to:date}' AND (phase LIKE '${phase}' OR '${phase}' = '%') AND (product_id LIKE '${product}' OR '${product}' = '%') AND (station_id LIKE '${station}' OR '${station}' = '%') GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1
SELECT run_id, session_id, started_at, outcome, dut_serial, station_id, num_measurements FROM runs WHERE started_at BETWEEN '${__from:date}' AND '${__to:date}' ORDER BY started_at DESC LIMIT 50
